pageContext.name: Iron Spider
pageContext.description: I'm almost done putting the final touches to your new uniform. I've taken an opportunity to make some slight … improvements.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Iron Spider Fine Art Print, a Marvel Comics art print by acclaimed comic artist Mark Brooks.  Caught in the web of conflict, Peter Parker is pulled in all directions! Initially swayed to side with Iron Man in the super hero Civil War, Spider-Man gets a red and gold upgrade to his look. This tribute to an iconic super-suit features detailed rendering on the metallic costume elements and a warm yellow and orange background of mechanical gears. With vibrant repulsors, armored arachnid arms, and his heroic can-do attitude, Iron Spider is ready to face threats in the friendly neighborhood and beyond.  Originally created as a variant cover for Deadpool #14 (2019), written by Skottie Young for Marvel Comics, this comic book collectible is now available for fans in a high-end format. Each Iron Spider Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this Spider-Man wall art is a must-have for fans of the beloved wall-crawler.  Suit up with Spider-Man and add the Iron Spider Fine Art Print by Mark Brooks to your collection today!
